Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: We need to construct a process tree given the detailed description using the provided operators sequence exclusive choice parallel loop and leaves as activities or silent steps

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Start with A then RG then IA All sequential So a sequence of A RG IA

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After IA mandatory sequence TI then TC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Based on triage classification exclusive choice between CE and FBP So after TC an exclusive choice X CE FBP

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The loop commences if abnormal The first step of the loop is SC So the loop body would be the sequence of SC treatment choice and RDT

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: The loop operator is binary A is executed then either exit or execute B and then A again Here after RDT if abnormal you go back to SC without any extra step That would mean B is empty tau

Name: Hypothesis Generation - PE
Text: We can represent this as loop of sequence SC treatment choice RDT with tau as the redo child

Name: Validation - PE
Text: This exactly models after RDT if normal exit loop if abnormal do nothing tau and repeat A

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After the initial diagnostic test we have an exclusive choice either normal then proceed or abnormal then enter loop So after InitTest we have X tau Loop

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: After normal results are finally achieved proceed with AI and NC in true concurrency So parallel plus AI NC

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Once AI and NC are finished a final sequence FAS then DDI

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Before leaving a concurrency block handles BL ICP MRF in true concurrency Since plus is binary we need to nest the parallel operator

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Overall sequence A RG IA TI TC Initial Diagnostic choice Post Test choice parallel AI NC FAS DDI final parallel BL ICP MRF

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Check all activities are present A RG IA TI TC CE FBP SC TM SPT FCE FBA AI NC FAS DDI BL ICP MRF

Name: Validation - PE
Text: Check sequence order A then RG then IA then TI then TC then initial test then optional loop then parallel AI NC then FAS then DDI then final parallel Exactly matches
